word: G2442 - ἱμείρομαι - himeíromai - him-i'-rom-ahee - Be affectionately desirous

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Be affectionately desirous
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to desire, long for, especially of the longing of love
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Middle voice from ἵμερος himeros (a yearning; of uncertain affinity); to long for: - be affectionately desirous.
